name: SkyMarks
tagline: Bookmark Your Social Posts
fullDescription: SkyMarks is the Bluesky bookmark app for all your iOS devices.Bluesky is the biggest thing happening in social media in 2024. It seems like everyone is jumping on board.When you do, though, you may find some things that you miss from your old social networks, like the ability to bookmark a post. It’s a common thing to want to save a post to come back to later. Maybe you want to think a while before responding. Maybe the post has a useful link in it that you want to come back to.  Or maybe you just really like the post and want to get back to it later.Until Bluesky decides to implement bookmarking itself, SkyMarks can be your Bluesky bookmark manager.To bookmark a post while in Safari, just tap the share button (the button with the arrow pointing out of a box) and then select SkyMarks from the list of available options. Once you’ve bookmarked a post, it will be available in SkyMarks whenever you need it. From there, you can search your bookmarks and return to the post that you bookmarked.SkyMarks synchs its bookmarks across all your devices that use the same Apple ID. So if you bookmark a post while you’re waiting in line at the grocery store, you’ll find it on your iPad when you’re reading in your living room or working at your desk.SkyMarks is free to use and has no in-app purchases. It’s just here to make the transition to Bluesky a little easier for you. If you find a bug or want a feature, please provide feedback.SkyMarks will hopefully one day be open-source. There are a few issues that need to be figured out before it’s released to the public though.
classificationReason: iOS app specifically for bookmarking Bluesky posts, addressing a missing native feature in Bluesky
